question: How do I reset my password
answer: Go to settings > account > reset password and follow the email link

question: Why is my video call lagging
answer: Check your internet speed; lag usually means bandwidth below 2mbps

question: How do I cancel my subscription
answer: Go to billing settings and click cancel plan

question: App crashes on startup
answer: Try clearing cache or reinstalling the latest app version

question: How to enable dark mode
answer: Go to settings > display > toggle dark mode

question: How do I add a payment method
answer: Navigate to billing > payment methods > add new card

question: Video call has no audio
answer: Check microphone permissions in your device settings

question: How to invite team members
answer: Go to workspace settings > members > send invite

question: App is very slow
answer: Try restarting the app or checking for background processes

question: How to upgrade my plan
answer: Go to billing > plans > select upgrade

question: How do I enable notifications
answer: Go to settings > notifications > toggle push alerts on

question: Screen sharing is not working
answer: Make sure screen recording permission is enabled in your OS settings

question: How to change my email address
answer: Go to account settings > update email > verify with OTP

question: Chat messages are not sending
answer: Check your internet connection or restart the app

question: How to delete my account
answer: Go to settings > account > delete account and confirm via email
